PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHN DOUGLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVENS, MICHAEL F. $2,593.84 PRINCIPAL, $720.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $25.56 INTEREST, $612.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,951.65, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR
